raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Senate Bill 591 enables affordable housing developers to build intergenerational housing for the elderly and foster youth transitioning to adulthood by using tax credits for financing.",
    "Intergenerational living spaces create a dynamic and supportive community that traditional forms of age-restricted housing cannot match.",
    "Tax credits are well-used tools to help finance affordable housing for people ages 55 and older.",
    "Prior to SB 591, financing for affordable housing typically prohibited the inclusion of units for transition-aged youth in buildings designated for seniors.",
    "There are well-documented social and health benefits to seniors associated with intergenerational housing.",
    "Senate Bill 591 allows seniors and transition-aged youth to live in the same affordable housing complex.",
    "SB 591 provides affordable housing developers greater access to financing.",
    "SB 591 aims to help reduce the homeless population by providing housing opportunities for transition age youth."
  ]
}
```
